message:
perf(spec-evolution): precompute searchText field to eliminate per-filter string concatenation

The spec evolution viewer's global filter was building a lowercase search
string from subject + hash + short + author on every row for every
keystroke. This caused noticeable lag on large commit datasets.

- Add a `searchText` field to the Commit interface, computed once at load
  time by concatenating subject, hash, short, and author into a single
  pre-lowercased string
- Replace the multi-field `.toLowerCase().includes()` chain in the filter
  function with a single `.includes()` call against the cached searchText
- Net effect: O(1) string allocation at load vs O(n * fields) per filter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
